title: Surgeon Vacancy at Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Bhubaneswar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
